full_text:
Hui (Zi’nan)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Hui, styledZi’nan, was born in Possibly from Wu. An accomplished orator, served as envoy to Wei where he warned Cao Cao off from attacking. Hui was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Hui lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
